$schema_description: Data-driven safe-probe registry for document-driven AWS China feature verification. Each entry maps an AWS service and a set of feature keywords to a read-only List/Describe probe. Probe types: 'instance_family' runs DescribeInstanceTypeOfferings filtered by an EC2 instance family parsed from the feature; 'api_reachable' calls a zero-parameter List/Describe operation and only confirms the API endpoint is reachable in the region (an empty result does not prove feature support); 'resource_probe' calls a read-only List/Describe operation that needs one account resource identifier (declared as 'param_name', e.g. 'Bucket'). A resource_probe only runs when the caller explicitly provides a resource name; otherwise it is skipped without calling AWS, preserving the safe-by-default principle.

probe.interpretation: The legacy ListGlobalTables API is reachable; its response does not by itself prove current Global Tables feature support.
S3 Storage Lens is served by the s3control API. ListStorageLensConfigurations succeeding for the provided AccountId confirms the feature works in this region.
The S3 Intelligent-Tiering ListBucketIntelligentTieringConfigurations API is reachable for the provided bucket, confirming the feature's control-plane API works in this region.
The S3 GetBucketReplication API is reachable for the provided bucket; a NoSuchReplicationConfiguration response still confirms the feature API works.
The S3 GetBucketLifecycleConfiguration API is reachable for the provided bucket.
The S3 GetObjectLockConfiguration API is reachable for the provided bucket.
The DynamoDB DescribeTimeToLive API is reachable for the provided table, confirming the TTL feature API works in this region.
The DynamoDB DescribeContinuousBackups API is reachable for the provided table, confirming the PITR feature API works in this region.
The Kinesis ListStreams API is reachable in this region.
The Lambda ListFunctions API is reachable in this region.
The EFS DescribeFileSystems API is reachable in this region.
The ECR DescribeRepositories API is reachable in this region.
The SNS ListTopics API is reachable in this region.
The SQS ListQueues API is reachable in this region.
The Step Functions ListStateMachines API is reachable in this region.
The EKS ListClusters API is reachable in this region.
The ECS ListClusters API is reachable in this region.
The ElastiCache DescribeCacheClusters API is reachable in this region.
The OpenSearch ListDomainNames API is reachable in this region.
The Secrets Manager ListSecrets API is reachable in this region.
The CloudFront ListDistributions API is reachable in this partition.
The Glue GetJobs API is reachable in this region.
The SageMaker ListNotebookInstances API is reachable in this region.
